feed.title: Journal of China Computer-Assisted Language Learning
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of China Computer-Assisted Language Learning (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Cultivating AI literacy in language education: theoretical discussions and practical applications
entry.summary: Authors: Junjie Gavin Wu, Seongyong Lee, Danyang Zhang, Csaba Szabo DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0023 Pages: Page range: 169-174

entry.title: Critical AI literacy for applied linguistics and language education students
entry.summary: Authors: Pascual Pérez-Paredes, Niall Curry, Carlos Ordoñana-Guillamón DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0005 Pages: Page range: 175-214

entry.title: AI literacy in shadow education: exploring Chinese EFL practitioners’ perceptions and experiences
entry.summary: Authors: Qian Liu, Mengjie Jiang, Yonghua (Yoka) Wang, Liqun He DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0011 Pages: Page range: 215-242

entry.title: Enhancing EAP students’ academic writing and AI literacies: practice at a transnational university in China
entry.summary: Authors: Huimin He, Joseph Tinsley DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0004 Pages: Page range: 243-259

entry.title: Developing AI literacies and negotiating professional identities: a study of pre-service English teachers in a ChatGPT-facilitated pedagogy
entry.summary: Authors: Yilin You, Yue Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0007 Pages: Page range: 260-286

entry.title: Language teacher AI literacy: insights from collaborations with ChatGPT
entry.summary: Authors: Weiming Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2024-0030 Pages: Page range: 287-316

entry.summary: Authors: Yijia Fang, Shuai Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0018 Pages: Page range: 317-326

entry.title: Book Review on Technology and English Language Teaching in a Changing World: A Practical Guide for Teachers and Teacher Educators
entry.summary: Authors: Yunjing Guo DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2024-0027 Pages: Page range: 327-335
